chatroom.description: Self-hosted multi-Claude coordination chatroom. Subagent reads liberal; writes restricted to existing threads (chat_send / chat_ack require thread_id — root-thread creation is parent-only via /chat threads-open). Identity auto-resolved from $DDEV_PROJECT or 'host'. URL is prompted at plugin enable time (userConfig.chatroom_url) — default is 127.0.0.1:7477 for host; change to host.docker.internal:7477 for in-container consumers.
